title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 446.050 - Attendance of surveyor and witnesses — judge's duty
text:
446.050.  Attendance of surveyor and witnesses — judge's duty. — Such judge shall, upon application, issue his warrant to the sheriff of the county to cause to come before him, at a place on the land and on a day to be designated in the warrant, the county surveyor and such witnesses, as well without as within the county, as the person demanding such warrant, or other persons interested, may require.
(RSMo 1939 § 1975, A. 1949 S.B. 1126, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1811; 1919 § 5498; 1909 § 6441 
Effective 1-02-79
